title: Stop perfecting your prompt. Do this instead
summary: Jeff Su argues that optimizing context engineering is more valuable than perfecting prompts. He explains three key concepts: grounding (anchoring AI responses to actual documents), RAG (retrieving sources before generating), and context engineering (assembling all necessary information rather than just polishing wording).
